author: nflaig
content: <@592004585506340885> https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/pull/5005 seems to be a broken test

author: jtraglia
content: Oops good catch. I think we should keep the current test name though. That’s the style we should aim for with new tests. So we can do “make test k=test_builder_voluntary_exit” to run all tests for that.
